description: Lightweight regression set for quick-commit. Each eval pairs a sandbox git repo (built by fixtures/setup.sh) with a short user prompt and a list of typed assertions. Assertions have weight 'must' (hard requirement) or 'should' (graded). Auto-checkable assertions use a `check` object; `qualitative` assertions are surfaced for human review.

fields.commit_message: string — exact commit message used (subject only; no body in v0.4)
fields.commit_hash: string — short hash of the new commit, or null on no-commit
fields.files_committed: string[] — repo-relative paths included in the commit
fields.files_skipped: {path,reason}[] — files the skill intentionally did not stage (should be empty in v0.4: `git add -A` always)
fields.final_status_short: string — `git status --short` output after the commit

regex_match.desc: Regex matches anywhere in the field's stringified value.

regex_not_match.desc: Regex does NOT match anywhere in the field.

array_excludes.desc: Array contains none of these elements.

array_includes_all.desc: Array contains all of these elements.

subject_length_le.desc: First line of commit_message is ≤ max chars.

qualitative.desc: Skipped by auto-grader; printed as 'manual' for human review.

global_rules: Skill must always use `git add -A` and `git commit --no-verify`; never `--amend`.
Commit message is `<type>: <subject>` — no scope, no body.
Commit language must mirror the recent git log (English vs Chinese vs mixed).
On a clean tree the skill should report 'nothing to commit' and not invent a commit.
On a rebase/merge/cherry-pick in progress, the skill must bail out and surface the state.

evals.name: feat-simple
evals.scenario: One tracked file modification (`src/parser.ts`) adds trailing-comma support and a new exported function. Repo log uses English Conventional Commits.

assertions.human: Subject mentions BOTH trailing-comma support AND the new parseArray export.

evals.name: fix-chinese
evals.scenario: One tracked file modification (`auth.py`) adds a None guard preventing attribute access on a null user/profile — a real bug fix. Repo log is entirely Chinese Conventional Commits.

assertions.human: Subject contains CJK characters (matches log language).
User-facing report is Chinese (matches prompt language).
Subject describes the actual condition (None / 空 / 为空), not just '修复 bug'.
